What We Do

Our Services

Professional landscaping company solutions tailored to your needs.

Lawn Care

Maintain a lush, healthy lawn with our comprehensive lawn care services.

Landscape Design

Transform your outdoor space with our expert landscape design services.

Learn More →

Hardscaping

Enhance your outdoor living space with our custom hardscaping solutions.

Learn More →

Irrigation Systems

Keep your landscape healthy and hydrated with our efficient irrigation solutions.

Learn More →

Spring & Fall Cleanup

Prepare your landscape for the changing seasons with our thorough cleanup services.

Learn More →

Tree & Shrub Care

Maintain the health and beauty of your trees and shrubs with our expert care services.

Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality landscaping company services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

A & A Landscaping has been taking care of my lawn for two years now, and I couldn't be happier. My lawn is the envy of the neighborhood! They are reliable, professional, and always do a great job. Highly recommend!

Sarah M.
★★★★★

A & A Landscaping built a beautiful patio in my backyard this summer. They were very helpful in the design process and the finished product is exactly what I wanted. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they communicated well throughout the project.

David K.
★★★★

I hired A & A Landscaping to redesign my front yard, and I am thrilled with the results. They created a beautiful and functional landscape that has completely transformed the look of my home. The team was professional, creative, and easy to work with.

Emily R.
★★★★★

A & A Landscaping installed a new irrigation system in my yard, and it has made a huge difference. My lawn is healthier and greener than ever before, and I'm saving water too. The installation was quick and efficient, and the team was very knowledgeable.

Michael S.
★★★★★

A & A Landscaping did a great job with my spring cleanup this year. They removed all the leaves and debris from my yard, and my garden beds look fantastic. They were on time, efficient, and reasonably priced. I will definitely use them again next year.

Jennifer L.
★★★★

Our mature trees were looking rough. A & A Landscaping came out and pruned them perfectly. They now look healthier and the yard looks so much better. Great service!

Robert B.
★★★★★

How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Our Promise

Why Choose A & A Landscaping & Maintenance

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How often should I fertilize my lawn in Boise?
We recommend fertilizing your lawn at least twice a year, in the spring and fall. This helps to provide the nutrients your lawn needs to thrive in Boise's climate.
What types of weeds do you treat?
We treat a wide variety of common Boise weeds, including dandelions, crabgrass, and clover. Our weed control program is designed to eliminate existing weeds and prevent new ones from emerging.
Do you offer organic lawn care options?
Yes, we offer organic lawn care options for clients who prefer a more natural approach. These options utilize organic fertilizers and weed control methods.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's A & A Landscaping & Maintenance.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
